indications.text:
XTORO* (finafloxacin otic suspension), 0.3% is indicated for the treatment of acute otitis
externa (AOE) with or without an otowick, caused by susceptible strains of Pseudomonas
aeruginosa and Staphylococcus aureus in patients age 1 year and older.
